name: Brock Lesnar

qualityWinLedger.context: UFC heavyweight champion and all-time name, age context noted.
Undefeated interim champion and elite heavyweight contender.

primeWindowDetail.endReason: Cain closes it. Overeem is post-diverticulitis/post-prime context.

lossContextEvents.context: Originally a Lesnar decision win; overturned to a no contest and excluded from loss scoring.

shortCase: Brock is the short-window heavyweight champion case: tiny sample, huge impact, real title wins, and one of the strangest fast rises in UFC history.
bestArgument: Few fighters ever reached real UFC heavyweight champion status faster.
counterArgument: The counter is obvious: tiny sample, Cain, Overeem, no long reign, and no broad contender run.
whyRankedHere: Lesnar lands here because his UFC heavyweight title run was real: he beat Couture, smashed Mir in the rematch, and survived Carwin to defend the belt.
whyNotHigher: He does not rank higher because the elite UFC sample is tiny, the title reign was short, Cain ended the run quickly, and the later Overeem/Hunt chapter does not add résumé depth.
finalTakeaway: Brock is a real UFC heavyweight champion case, not just a star-power case — but the résumé is too short to push higher.
